Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Bonus Runes - Singleplayer
Fields.Description: Amount of soul that can be obtained when defeating an area boss (in single play)

Fields.Name: Bonus Runes - Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Amount of soul that can be obtained when defeating an area boss (during multiplayer)

Fields.Name: Humanity Point Count Flag ID
Fields.Description: First flag ID for managing humanity drop points (using 20 Bit)

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [1]
Fields.Description: Threshold for acquiring humanity 1

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [2]
Fields.Description: Threshold 2 for acquiring humanity

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [3]
Fields.Description: Threshold 3 for acquiring humanity

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [4]
Fields.Description: Threshold 4 for acquiring humanity

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [5]
Fields.Description: Threshold 5 for acquiring humanity

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [6]
Fields.Description: Threshold 6 for acquiring humanity

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [7]
Fields.Description: Threshold for acquiring humanity 7

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [8]
Fields.Description: Threshold for acquiring humanity 8

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [9]
Fields.Description: Threshold for acquiring humanity 9

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Threshold [10]
Fields.Description: Threshold 10 for acquiring humanity

Fields.Name: Min Invasion Spawns added after Boss Defeat
Fields.Description: The minimum value of solo intrusion points to be added when defeating an area boss.

Fields.Name: Max Invasion Spawns added after Boss Defeat
Fields.Description: The maximum value of solo intrusion points to be added when defeating an area boss.

Fields.Name: Boss Defeat Flag - For Purpose List
Fields.Description: If this flag is ON, it will not be displayed in the list of purpose settings at the time of hosting. If it is 0, it is always displayed.

Fields.Name: Boss Challenge Flag ID
Fields.Description: Boss challengeable flag ID. When selecting the target boss in the intrusion position search when Is the intrusion point automatically generated? In the multiplayer area para is , the boss with this flag ON is targeted. If it is 0, it is always the target.

Fields.Name: Boss Defeat Flag ID
Fields.Description: Boss defeat flag ID. When selecting the target boss in the intrusion position search when Is the intrusion point automatically generated? In the multiplayer area para is , the boss with this flag OFF is targeted.

Fields.Name: Boss Coordinate X
Fields.Description: Boss position_X coordinates (relative coordinates from the specified map). It is used to check the distance between the host and the boss in the intrusion position search when Is the intrusion point automatically generated? In the multiplayer area para.

Fields.Name: Boss Coordinate Y
Fields.Description: Boss position_Y coordinates (relative coordinates from the specified map). It is used to check the distance between the host and the boss in the intrusion position search when Is the intrusion point automatically generated? In the multiplayer area para.

Fields.Name: Boss Coordinate Z
Fields.Description: Boss position_Z coordinates (relative coordinates from the specified map). It is used to check the distance between the host and the boss in the intrusion position search when Is the intrusion point automatically generated? In the multiplayer area para.

Fields.Name: Map Area
Fields.Description: Boss position_area number (mXX_00_00_00). It is used to check the distance between the host and the boss in the intrusion position search when Is the intrusion point automatically generated? In the multiplayer area para.

Fields.Name: Map Block
Fields.Description: Boss position_grid X number (m00_XX_00_00). It is used to check the distance between the host and the boss in the intrusion position search when Is the intrusion point automatically generated? In the multiplayer area para.

Fields.Name: Map Region
Fields.Description: Boss position_grid Z number (m00_00_XX_00). It is used to check the distance between the host and the boss in the intrusion position search when Is the intrusion point automatically generated? In the multiplayer area para.
